name: Lit Decorative Easter Blow Mold Bunny White - Spritz™
description:
Get your home ready for Easter with the Lit Decorative Easter Blow Mold Bunny White - Spritz™. Crafted from durable plastic, this white bunny sculpture is a delightful addition to any indoor setting. Standing at 11.81 inches tall, it's perfect for adding a whimsical touch to your holiday décor. Its lightweight design makes it easy to move and display, while the classic color effortlessly complements various styles.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
